info.title: Care Plan 2.0
info.description:
External Clinical API

**Internal IDs**
The following terms are used to reference IDs that identify resources in AlayaCare:
- id
- created_by
- client_id
- employee_id
- plan_id
- diagnosis_id
- goal_id
- intervention_id


**External IDs**
The following terms are used to reference IDs that identify resources systems external to AlayaCare:
- external_employee_id
- external_client_id
- external_service_id

External IDs are required to be unique.
No other assumptions are made regarding their format they are treated as strings.

**Remarks**
- All dates must be in ISO 8601 format.
- Required fields marked with `*` cannot be null.

parameters.description: Send request using the client Alayacare ID
parameters.name: client_id

get.summary: Get a list of care plan base information using the client Alayacare ID

parameters.name: start_date_from
parameters.description:
Filter by care plan start date time greater or equal than specified value.
If not specified will default to now.
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
`start_date_from` can be used as this filter name.
Ex: `2018-02-03T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: start_date_to
parameters.description:
Filter by care plan start date time less than or equal than specified value.
If not specified will default to 7 days from now.
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
`start_date_to` can be used as this filter name
Ex: `2019-02-18T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: end_date_from
parameters.description:
Filter by care plan end date time greater or equal than specified value. 
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
Ex: `2019-02-03T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: end_date_to
parameters.description:
Filter by care plan date time less than or equal than specified value. 
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
Ex: `2018-02-18T08:00:00-05:00`

post.summary: Create a care plan using the client Alayacare ID

parameters.description: Send request using the client external ID
parameters.name: external_client_id

get.summary: Get a list of care plan base information using the client external ID

parameters.name: start_date_from
parameters.description:
Filter by careplan start date time greater or equal than specified value.
If not specified will default to now.
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
`start_at` can be used as this filter name.
Ex: `2018-02-03T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: start_date_to
parameters.description:
Filter by careplan start date time less than or equal than specified value.
If not specified will default to 7 days from now.
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
`end_at` can be used as this filter name
Ex: `2019-02-18T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: end_date_from
parameters.description:
Filter by visit end date time greater or equal than specified value. 
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
Ex: `2019-02-03T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: end_date_to
parameters.description:
Filter by visit end date time less than or equal than specified value. 
Expected format is ISO 8601 converted to UTC timezone.
Ex: `2018-02-18T08:00:00-05:00`

parameters.name: client_id

get.summary: Get the detailed information of the active care plan using Alayacare client ID
get.description:
Deprecated. Use /careplans/currently-active instead.
Returns the detailed information of the active careplan, including all sub entities referenced as `root_item` (`diagnosis`, `goal` and `intervention`)

- Specifying `root_item_id` and `root_item_type` filters will return the `root_item` and any item linked to it.   Both filters must be valid and specified together or an error will be returned.
- For example, if a specific `diagnosis_id` is linked to 2 goals then the 3 entities will be returned when filtering on the type `diagnosis`  and the specific `diagnosis_id`

parameters.description: Only return the details for the specified root item ID (`diagnosis`, `goal` and `intervention` IDs)
parameters.name: root_item_id

parameters.description: Only return the details for the specified root items type (`diagnosis`, `goal` or `intervention`)
parameters.name: root_item_type

parameters.description: Set the start date of the search period for the root items (`diagnosis`, `goal` and `intervention`) (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: from

parameters.description: Set the end date of the search period for the root items (`diagnosis`, `goal` and `intervention`) (YYYY-MM-DD)
parameters.name: to

put.summary: Update care plan base information using the care plan ID
Change status of care plan to active using the care plan ID
put.description:
- If a care plan is in `completed` or `archived` status, then the care plan cannot be re-activated again.
- Only `one` care plan can be active at a time.
- If an existing care plan is currently active, and you wish to create and activate a new care plan, then the `start_date` of the new care plan must be `after` the `start _date` of the currently active care plan.

204.description: Status of Careplan was updated to active

put.summary: Change status of care plan to archived using the care plan ID
put.description: - Care plans in active status must be completed before they can be archived.

204.description: Status of Careplan was updated to archived

put.summary: Change status of care plan to completed using the care plan ID

204.description: Status of Careplan was updated to completed

parameters.description: Send request using the Alayacare care plan ID
parameters.name: plan_id

get.summary: Get a list of diagnoses within a care plan using the care plan ID

post.summary: Create a diagnosis in a care plan using the care plan ID
post.description:
Create dignosis attached to a careplan
- `rank` will automatically be set to next available rank
- Only services assigned to the client can be linked to the diagnosis.
- `service_id` and `external_service_id` are mutually exclusive, specifying both is an invalid request.
- Will be applied to all services defined on the client if none is selected
- All departments will be applied if `department_id` set to `null`

get.summary: Get a specific diagnosis by diagnosis ID

200.description: The diagnosis defined by diagnosis ID

put.summary: Update a specific diagnosis using the diagnosis ID
put.description:
Update a diagnosis attached to a careplan
- Only services assigned to the client can be linked to the diagnosis.
- `service_id` and `external_service_id` are mutually exclusive, specifying both is an invalid request.

delete.summary: Delete a specific diagnosis using the diagnosis ID
delete.description: - A diagnosis can only be in `draft` status to be deleted

put.summary: Update a specific diagnosis status to archived
put.description: - A diagnosis can only be archived if the care plan is in active status.

204.description: Successfully changed status of diagnosis to archived

put.summary: Update a specific diagnosis status to completed
put.description: - A diagnosis can only be completed if the care plan is in active status.

204.description: Successfully changed status of diagnosis to completed

get.summary: Get a list of available goal types

parameters.description: Send request using the Alayacare care plan ID
parameters.name: plan_id

get.summary: Get the list of goals within a care plan using the care plan ID
get.description: - Goals must be enabled in the UI at the tenant System Setting level.

post.summary: Create a goal in a care plan using the care plan ID
post.description:
Create goal attached to a careplan
- Goals must be enabled in the UI at the tenant System Setting level
- `rank` will automatically be set to next available rank
- Only services assigned to the client can be linked to the goal
- `service_id` and `external_service_id` are mutually exclusive, specifying both is an invalid request.
- Will be applied to all services defined on the client if none is selected
- All departments will be applied if `department_id` is set to `null`

get.summary: Get a specific goal by goal ID

200.description: The goal defined by goal ID

put.summary: Update a specific goal using the goal ID
put.description:
Update a goal attached to a careplan
- Only services assigned to the client can be linked to the goal.
- `service_id` and `external_service_id` are mutually exclusive, specifying both is an invalid request.

delete.summary: Delete a specific goal using the goal ID
delete.description: - Only goals in `draft` status can be deleted

parameters.description: ID of goal with changed status
parameters.name: goal_id

put.summary: Change the status of a specific goal to archived
put.description: - A goal can only be archived if the care plan is in active status.

204.description: Successfully changed status of goal to archived

parameters.description: ID of goal with changed status
parameters.name: goal_id

parameters.description: object to be sent at completion
parameters.name: body

put.summary: Change the status of a specific goal to completed
put.description: - A goal can only be completed if the care plan is in active status.

204.description: Successfully changed status of goal to archived

parameters.description: Search for a form using the form name. This will return all forms containing the search string.
parameters.name: filter

get.summary: Get a list of report forms to attach to an intervention.
get.description:
- Only forms that the current user can view will be returned.
- Disabled forms will be excluded.
- Results are ordered alphabetically by the form description.

get.summary: Get a list of available intervention types.
Get the intervention list of a Careplan

post.summary: Create an intervention in a Careplan using Alayacare care plan ID
post.description:
Create an intervention in a careplan. Based on Intervention are then recurrence definition they will them be available as visit interventions. 
- `recurrence_type` can be set with a frequency of `per_visit`, `per_request` or `custom`
 For `custom`  recurrence type the `recurrence` object is mandatory and additionnal information is required to define the frequency and the availability of the intervention.
- `include_485` is Only required if the 485 feature flag is tuned ON

Interventions can be linked to an alaycare Module
- `id` is the ID on the entity selected in the module and assigned to the client
- Form ID of the linked form is required to be set if `form` module is selected.
- Vital ID of the linked vital can only be set if `vital` module is selected. Will be defaulted to `all` if no vital `id` is sent.
- Medication ID of the linked medication can only be set if `medication` module is selected. Will be defaulted to `all` if no medication `id` is sent.

get.summary: Get a specific intervention by intervention ID

put.description:
Update an intervention attached to a careplan
- Only services assigned to the client can be linked to the intervention

delete.summary: Delete a care plan intervention using the intervention ID
delete.description:
Delete a Care plan intervention
- Only interventions in `draft` status can be deleted

204.description: Successfully updated status of intervention to archived
Successfully updated status of intervention to archived

VisitGoalDetails.description: The visit goal details. The visit goal will be uniquely identified using the `visit_id` and the `goal_id`.

completed.description: Whether the goal was completed during the course of the visit

progress_percentage.description: Completion percentage of the goal at the end of the visit

comment.description: Comment related to goal progress in the visit
A comment to be provided if the goal was not completed.
comment.example: Unable to complete the goal today

progress_percentage.description: Goal progress if the tracking method is `percentage`, between 0 and 100.

is_required.description: Defines if the intervention is required to be completed or commented on to be able to clock out from a visit. If not set will be defaulted to false.

updated_at.description: Date of the last update thi care plan (ISO date format)

revision.description: Revision of the intervention, fixing its properties at a certain point in time

name.description: Name of the intervention

recurrence_type.description: Type of recurrence the user chose. The 'recurrence' field will be present if the value is 'custom' and absent otherwise

description.example: Try walk short distances. Increase the distance each time.

DeconstructedFrequency.description:
Definition of the intervention frequency. 
- Is only required if `recurrence_type` is set to `custom`
- `available_from` and `available_to` allow to define the Time of day when the intervention is available. Only present for `daily`, `weekly` and `monthly` frequencies. if not set will be defaulted to `any time of the day`.

frequency.description: The frequency type of the intervention. Additionnal information are required for `daily`, `weekly` and `monthly` frequencies.

count.description: The number of time the intervention must be executed. Only required for `daily`, `weekly` and `monthly` frequencies.

weekdays.description: Only present when the 'frequency' field is set to 'weekly'

monthday.description: Only present when the 'frequency' field is set to 'monthly'

name.description: Alayacare entity name

InterventionModule.description: Alayacare module attached to care plan intervention. If not set no alayacare module will be linked to the intervention.

name.description: Alayacare module name linked to the intervention

id.description:
`id` is the ID on the entity selected in the module and assigned to the client
- Form ID of the linked form. Is required to be set if `form` module is selected.
- vital ID of the linked vital. Can only be set if `vital` module is selected. Will be defaulted to `all` if no `vital_id` is sent.
- Medication ID of the linked medication. Can only be set if `medication` module is selected. Will be defaulted to `all` if no `medication_id` is sent.

count.description: Number of items in the response

id.description: Report form ID of the task.

name.description: Name of the report form. Limited to 256 chars.
Branch name

count.description: Number of items in the response
